mdRecord.dcterms:title: Criminal Warrants, Justice of the Peace: Commonwealth vs W.C. Akers
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Commonwealth vs W.C. Akers Offense: Assault and Battery Victim and Complainant J.M. Boyd Recorded in Floyd County Courthouse 11.27.1887 Guilty, Court cost: $1.00, Fine:$2.50 Defendant plead quilty
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
Warrants (Law)
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
